# Sedimentary Fabric

**Summary**: The physical structure of sedimentary rocks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] evaluated the role of sedimentary fabrics on permeability variations.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] Fabric influences the connectivity and orientation of pore spaces.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] analyzed via 3D imaging and high-resolution microscopy.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Load casts and burrows created significant heterogeneity in permeability distribution. ([[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022, p. 83]])
